title: ICWA Jobs 2026 – Chief Financial Officer
location: Daman and Diu, Daman and Diu
shortInfo: Omnibus Industrial Development Corporation (OIDC) Recruitment 2026 for 1 Chief Financial Officer (CFO) post. Candidates with Degree in Commerce, CA, ICWA, or MBA Finance with experience can apply offline before 02-06-2026 through the official OIDC website. Check eligibility, salary, age limit, and application process here.

basic_details.job_title: OIDC Chief Financial Officer (CFO) Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Omnibus Industrial Development Corporation (OIDC) Recruitment 2026 for 1 Chief Financial Officer (CFO) post. Candidates with Degree in Commerce, CA, ICWA, or MBA Finance with experience can apply offline before 02-06-2026 through the official OIDC website. Check eligibility, salary, age limit, and application process here.
basic_details.job_location: Daman and Diu, Daman and Diu

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the OIDC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Commerce, Chartered Accountant, ICWA, or MBA in Finance. Minimum 5 years of experience.
qualification.details: Chief Financial Officer (CFO): Degree in Commerce from a recognized university. Chartered Accountant or ICWA or M.B.A in Finance from a Govt. recognized university. Minimum five years of working experience in the field of Finance with any Government Company/PSUs/Private listed good reputed Company registered under the Companies Act.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the OIDC CFO recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the offline application for the OIDC Chief Financial Officer (CFO) position is 02-06-2026.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the CFO post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) post will receive a salary of Rs. 106000 Per Month.

faq.question: What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the CFO role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree in Commerce, or be a Chartered Accountant, ICWA, or hold an MBA in Finance from a recognized university.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the maximum age limit for the Chief Financial Officer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) position is 40 years.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the CFO post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for this OIDC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: What is the required work experience for the CFO position?
faq.answer: A minimum of five years of working experience in the field of Finance with a Government Company, PSU, or a reputed private listed company is required.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the OIDC CFO recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) post will primarily involve Document Verification.

faq.question: Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Omnibus Industrial Development Corporation (OIDC).
